data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 3/25 (Mon), Bounty rewards will be doubled! 
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your student's skill!

🗓️Period: 3/25 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 4/1 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
